name: Patchwork Ordinance Adjudication (POA) v1
description: Given a solver-visible packet consisting of a fictional base ordinance, later amendments, and a case file, compute the final adjudication string under exact precedence and fee-composition rules.
capabilities_measured: spec-following under precedence and override rules

closest_existing_benchmarks.name: document understanding / expert QA
closest_existing_benchmarks.why_not_duplicate: POA requires compiling several interacting normative documents into an exact machine-checkable output, rather than answering free-form questions from a passage.

closest_existing_benchmarks.name: tool-agent or coding-adjacent reasoning tasks
closest_existing_benchmarks.why_not_duplicate: A solver may write code, but success depends on faithfully reconstructing the public rule stack from semi-natural-language amendment packets instead of solving hidden unit tests or API tasks.
